name: mentor
description: IDE for RDF knowledge graph projects including SPARQL notebooks.

scripts.package: rimraf dist && npm run build:font && node ./build.js --production && vsce package --no-dependencies -o dist/mentor.vsix

viewsWelcome.contents:
Welcome to the Mentor extension for Visual Studio Code! This view shows all RDF files in your current workspace for quick access.

 There are currently no RDF documents in your workspace.

[Create Document](command:mentor.command.createDocument)

[Manage Connections](command:mentor.command.manageSparqlConnections)

Find more information and help at [mentor-vscode.dev](command:mentor.command.openMentorHomepage)

colors.description: Color used for tree nodes representing concepts or concept references.
Color used for tree nodes representing class or class references.
Color used for tree nodes representing literals.
Color used for tree nodes representing object properties.
Color used for tree nodes representing data property.
Color used for keywords in the editor.
Color used for comments in the editor.
Color used for local names in the editor.
Color used for IRIs in the editor.
Color used for namespace prefixes in the editor.
Color used for boolean literals in the editor.
Color used for numeric literals in the editor.
Color used for quoted literals in the editor.
Color used for datatype IRIs in the editor.
Color used for language tags in the editor.

editor/context.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == 'sparql' || editorLangId == 'turtle' || editorLangId == 'trig' || editorLangId == 'n3' || editorLangId == 'ntriples' || editorLangId == 'nquads' || editorLangId == 'datalog')

mentor.sparql.defaultInferenceEnabled.title: Default Inference Enabled
mentor.sparql.defaultInferenceEnabled.description: Default value for whether inferred triples should be included in SPARQL query results. This applies to connections that support inference toggling (e.g., the workspace store).

mentor.sparql.listGraphsQuery.title: List Graphs Query
mentor.sparql.listGraphsQuery.description: SPARQL query used to retrieve all named graphs and the default graph from a SPARQL endpoint.

mentor.sparql.dropGraphQuery.title: Drop Graph Query
mentor.sparql.dropGraphQuery.description: SPARQL query used to drop a named graph from a SPARQL endpoint.

mentor.sparql.describeQueryTemplate.title: Describe Query Template
mentor.sparql.describeQueryTemplate.description: SPARQL query template used by the describe command. Use {{resourceIri}} for the selected resource and {{fromClauses}} for optional FROM clauses generated from graph URIs.

mentor.sparql.queryTimeout.title: Query Timeout
mentor.sparql.queryTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for SPARQL query execution. Set to 0 for no timeout.

mentor.definitionTree.labelStyle.title: Default Tree Label Style
mentor.definitionTree.labelStyle.description: Set the standard style for rendering of tree labels.
enumDescriptions: Render labels from the annotated label predicates.
Render the URI path element or fragment of the URI.
Render the URI path element or fragment with namespace prefix.

mentor.definitionTree.defaultLayout.title: Default Definitions Tree Layout
mentor.definitionTree.defaultLayout.description: Set the standard style for rendering the definitions tree hierarchy.
enumDescriptions: Group all classes, properties and individuals in the definitions tree under common top level nodes for each type.
Group classes, properties and invdividuals in the definitions tree under seperate nodes for each ontology or concept scheme.

mentor.definitionTree.defaultLanguageTag.title: Default Language
mentor.definitionTree.defaultLanguageTag.description: Set the default language tag to be used for rendering of labels and descriptions in the definitions tree.

mentor.definitionTree.decorateMissingLan.title: Decorate Missing Language Tags
mentor.definitionTree.decorateMissingLan.description: Grey out all terms in the definitions tree that do not have a value which is tagged in the currently selected language.
enumDescriptions: Disable the decoration of missing language tags.
Grey out missing language tags for definitions in all sources.
Grey out missing language tags only for definitions in the active document.

mentor.inference.enabled.title: Enable Inferencing Toggle
mentor.inference.enabled.description: If enabled, you will be able to toggle inferencing on and off for SPARQL connections that support this feature.

mentor.predicates.label.title: Label Predicates
mentor.predicates.label.description: Manage the predicates to be used for labels in the tree view for classes, properties and individuals. The first matching predicate will be used.

mentor.predicates.description.title: Description Predicates
mentor.predicates.description.description: Manage the predicates to be used for descriptions in the tree view for classes, properties and individuals. The first matching predicate will be used.

mentor.namespaces.title: Namespaces
mentor.namespaces.description: Manage the namespace URIs to be used in vocabularies.

defaultPrefix.description: The default abbreviation to be used for the namespace URI if no other is defined.

mentor.index.useGitIgnore.title: Use .gitignore
mentor.index.useGitIgnore.description: If enabled, the .gitignore file will be used to exclude files and folders from the workspace index.

mentor.index.ignoreFolders.title: Excluded Folders
mentor.index.ignoreFolders.description: Manage the folders that should be skipped when indexing the workspace.

mentor.index.maxFileSize.title: Max File Size
mentor.index.maxFileSize.description: Files above the specified size (bytes) will not be automatically be indexed at application startup to improve performance. References and definitions in larger files will not be available in the text editors. Opening a larger file in an editor or running the 'Analyze Workspace' command will index files above this limit.

mentor.editor.codeLensEnabled.title: Enable Code Lenses
mentor.editor.codeLensEnabled.description: If enabled, the editor will show the number of total references and other metrics for each subject in a document.

mentor.prefixes.queryParameterName.title: Query Parameter Name
mentor.prefixes.queryParameterName.description: Name of the query parameter that is appended to URIs that already contain a fragment identifier (e.g. vscode-notebook-cell) when generating workspace: URIs.

mentor.prefixes.autoDefinePrefixes.title: Auto Define Namespaces
mentor.prefixes.autoDefinePrefixes.description: If enabled, the extension will automatically declare namespaces in the document header. The namespaces that are defined in workspace documents are used in preference over the ones retrieved from prefix.cc.

mentor.prefixes.prefixDefinitionMode.title: Prefix Definition Mode
mentor.prefixes.prefixDefinitionMode.description: Set the way prefixes are automatically defined in the document header.
enumDescriptions: Append new prefixes to the end of the prefix definition list in the document header.
Maintain an alphabetical order of prefixes in the document header.

mentor.sorting.typeSortingOptions.title: Type Sorting Options
mentor.sorting.typeSortingOptions.description: Options for the priority-based sort strategy used when sorting documents by type. See https://github.com/faubulous/mentor-rdf-serializers/blob/main/docs/sorting.md#priority for reference.

typeOrder.description: RDF type IRIs in priority order. Resources of the first listed type appear first in the document.

predicateOrder.description: Predicate IRIs in priority order for secondary sorting within each type group.

unmatchedPosition.description: Where to place resources that do not match any type in typeOrder.

unmatchedSort.description: How to sort resources that do not match any type in typeOrder.

mentor.shacl.validation.title: SHACL Validation Configuration
mentor.shacl.validation.description: Explicit SHACL shape configuration. Configure workspace defaults and per-graph include/exclude rules.

defaults.description: Default SHACL shape graph URIs applied when a graph does not override defaults.

graphs.description: Per-graph SHACL shape settings keyed by canonical workspace graph URI.

includeDefaults.description: If true, include default SHACL shape graphs for this graph before applying include/exclude rules.

includeShapes.description: Additional SHACL shape graph URIs included for this graph.

excludeShapes.description: SHACL shape graph URIs removed from the effective set for this graph. Exclusions win over includes.

mentor.shacl.enabled.title: Enable Experimental SHACL Validation Features
mentor.shacl.enabled.description: If enabled, Mentor will show experimental SHACL validation features including the titlebar validate button and SHACL validation code lenses.

mentor.linting.enabled.title: Enable Linting
mentor.linting.enabled.description: If enabled, the extension will provide linting for RDF documents.

mentor.linting.unresolvedReferenceSeveri.title: Severity: Unresolved References
mentor.linting.unresolvedReferenceSeveri.description: The severity level for unresolved references in RDF documents.
enumDescriptions: Unresolved references will be treated as errors.
Unresolved references will be treated as warnings.
Unresolved references will be treated as information messages.
Unresolved references will be treated as hints.
Unresolved references will not be reported.

mentor.language.sparql.defaultDocumentTe.title: Default SPARQL Document Template
mentor.language.sparql.defaultDocumentTe.description: The default SPARQL document template to be used when creating a new SPARQL document.

mentor.language.sparql.documentQueryTemp.title: Document Query Template
mentor.language.sparql.documentQueryTemp.description: The SPARQL query template used when creating a query for an RDF document. Use {{documentUri}} as a placeholder for the document URI.

mentor.language.turtle.defaultDocumentTe.title: Default Turtle Document Template
mentor.language.turtle.defaultDocumentTe.description: The default Turtle document template to be used when creating a new Turtle document.

mentor.language.trig.defaultDocumentTemp.title: Default TriG Document Template
mentor.language.trig.defaultDocumentTemp.description: The default TriG document template to be used when creating a new TriG document.

mentor.language.n3.defaultDocumentTempla.title: Default N3 Document Template
mentor.language.n3.defaultDocumentTempla.description: The default N3 document template to be used when creating a new N3 document.

mentor.language.ntriples.defaultDocument.title: Default N-Triples Document Template
mentor.language.ntriples.defaultDocument.description: The default N-Triples document template to be used when creating a new N-Triples document.

mentor.language.nquads.defaultDocumentTe.title: Default N-Quads Document Template
mentor.language.nquads.defaultDocumentTe.description: The default N-Quads document template to be used when creating a new N-Quads document.

mentor.language.turtle.maxNumberOfProble.description: Controls the maximum number of problems produced by the server.
